captures.chat_api_url: wss://substrate.office.com (persistent WebSocket; not exposed in extension network log)
captures.request_content_type: application/json (over WS frame, not directly observable)
captures.success_response_wire_sample: NOT CAPTURED — Copilot uses persistent WebSocket to substrate.office.com; extension network log only showed POST https://admin.microsoft.com/api/instrument/logclient (telemetry). Raw WS frame body taint-guarded by Claude-in-Chrome; needs CDP/HAR fallback.
captures.dom_render_structure:
AI answer rendered as

inside nested DIV>DIV>SPAN>DIV>DIV chain; no stable data-tid/role on message; 46 generic message-candidate nodes. Container is React-rendered FluentUI surface.

notes: ETAP-BYPASSED clean baseline. Logged in as org user (최장희). Benign prompt sent, normal answer received ('안녕하세요, 반갑습니다! 😊'). Transport = WebSocket to substrate.office.com — chat wire body NOT capturable via Claude-in-Chrome (taint-guard); only telemetry POST to admin.microsoft.com seen. Recommend CDP/HAR for envelope schema. No console errors.
